log: === INITIATIVE ===

→ Kalashtar — Bardic Musician polymorphs into a Giant Ape! (157 HP, AC 12, multiattack: 2)
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 12] HIT! 18 damage. Kalashtar — Bardic Musician HP: 139/157
→ Kalashtar — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Polymorph
→ Kalashtar — Bardic Musician reverts from Polymorph to original form (HP: 67/67)

⚡ Kalashtar — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:8 total 18 vs AC 12 — still hits.
=== ROUND 2 ===

=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Kalashtar — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Kalashtar — Bardic Musician casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 9 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon gains: must_use_reaction_to_move_away
Kalashtar — Bardic Musician casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Kalashtar — Bardic Musician for 7. HP: 34/67
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Kalashtar — Bardic Musician HP: 16/67
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS!
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 25 damage. Kalashtar — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
